name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Added

- Added UniBridge_AssetIntelligence Action=Structure for read-only prefab and already-loaded scene asset structure workflows. Agents can list compact hierarchies, search by path/name/component/tag/layer/prefab and optional serialized fields, and read one object by path or indexedPath with component details.
- Added BatchActions aliases such as asset_structure, prefab_structure, scene_asset_structure, structure_search, serialized_asset_search, and read_yaml for the new structure workflow.

### Improved

- UniBridge_Discover Action=Tools now matches multi-token queries across tool names, descriptions, and aliases.
- UniBridge_ToolGuide Action=Workflow now prioritizes exact workflow keys before broader aliases.

### Previous Changes

- UniBridge_TypeSchema TypeIndex and TypeFingerprint provide compact loaded Unity type maps and cache fingerprints.
- UniBridge_BatchActions can append opt-in post-action console and editor-event diagnostics.
- UniBridge_RuntimeStateProbe Action=Assert evaluates read-only runtime watch/assertion rules and can fail BatchActions on required failed assertions.
- UniBridge_RuntimeStateProbe samples live component SerializedProperty/reflection values without arbitrary C# execution.
- UniBridge_RuntimeProfiler measures bounded ProfilerRecorder samples for runtime performance triage.
- UniBridge_ContextSnapshot includes an agentBrief onboarding block by default.
- Bundled relay 1.1.0-build.15 recovers RefreshAssets connection loss caused by Unity import/domain reload.
